recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: Stolen
recommendations.overview: A detective becomes obsessed with solving a child's 50-year-old murder, uncovering striking similarities between the case and his son's disappearance.

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Fog
recommendations.overview: A gripping and chilling thriller that brings us to a hazy mountain village where an enigmatic detective is investigating the sudden disappearance of fifteen-year-old girl.

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

recommendations.title: The Whole Truth
recommendations.overview: When two siblings stumble on a strange hole in the wall of their grandparents' house, horrifying incidents reveal sinister secrets about their family.

recommendations.title: The Hidden Face
recommendations.overview: A Spanish orchestra conductor deals with the mysterious disappearance of his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Mulholland Falls
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Los Angeles, a special crime squad of the LAPD investigates the murder of a young woman.

recommendations.title: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: In post–War England, a writer and sometime-ghost hunter investigates a reported haunting at a boys boarding school.
